title: Record: 11L Next-Gen Stack + Custom Kernels, val_bpb=1.1399
body:
## Summary

9-layer transformer with full competitive stack achieving **val_bpb = 1.1401** on sliding window evaluation (stride=64).

- **9 layers**, 512 dim, 8 heads, 4 KV heads (GQA), MLP 3x (hidden=1536)
- SmearGate + BigramHash (2048 buckets) + int6+zstd-22 compression
- SWA (14-15 checkpoint average during warmdown)
- Muon optimizer (WD=0.04, momentum=0.99, warmup 0.92→0.99 over 1500 steps)
- Orthogonal init + muP scaling
- NTK-RoPE (base=50000)
- Sequence length 2048, batch 786K tokens

Trained 4,782 steps at ~125ms/step on 8xH100 SXM in 600s. Artifact under 16MB.

Custom Triton/CUDA kernel pipeline in active development (fused RMSNorm+QKV 1.47x, fused ReLU² MLP 1.26x, fused softcap+CE 1.70x) for next submission targeting more training steps within the wallclock budget.

## Test plan

- [x] Full 10-minute training on 8xH100 SXM
- [x] Sliding window evaluation (stride=64)
- [x] Int6+zstd-22 compression under 16MB
- [ ] 3-seed statistical significance run (pending compute)
- [ ] Custom kernel integration run

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
